hero.sub: "Where hospitality is at home." A family mountain refuge among the high pastures, at 1552 metres above sea level.

services.title: Three ways to experience the mountain.
services.desc: One house, three intertwined traditions: milk from the pastures, family cooking, and nights under the wooden roof.
services.caseificio_title: The authentic taste of the mountain.
services.caseificio_desc: Alpine dairy cheeses aged in our wooden cellar.
services.gastro_desc: Cjarsons, frico, polenta on the fire, local cured meats.
services.rifugio_desc: Attic rooms in wood, fresh linen, windows open to the mountains.

about.title: A mountain refuge that feels like home.
about.lead: For three generations we have cared for this refuge in the Carnic Alps.
about.body: Cason di Lanza began as an alpine pasture and became a family refuge over the decades.

contact.title: Write to us, we await you in the mountains.
contact.desc: To book a table, a room, or simply to ask for information.

newsletter.title: Subscribe for exclusive updates.
newsletter.desc: An email every two months, written by the family. No promotions, no noise.

footer.tagline: Family refuge, artisan dairy and Carnic cuisine in the Carnic Alps.
